GROW WITH RASINDU
PETS NICHE (CATS & DOGS) VIDEOS
– GUIDE
JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
JOIN OUR WHATSAPP CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
Join my community to get future prompts and complete step-by-step guides
👉 nas.io/growwithrasindu
This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
================================================
VIRAL PET VIDEO — STEP BY STEP WORKFLOW
================================================
STEP 01 — MASTER PROMPT
================================================
Open Claude AI or ChatGPT.
Copy the master prompt and paste it in.
The AI will ask — Which niche? Dogs or Cats?
Type your niche.
================================================
STEP 02 — TOPIC SELECT
================================================
The AI gives you 10 video ideas.
Type the number of the idea you like most.
The AI gives you the script and scene breakdown.
================================================
STEP 03 — CHARACTER SELECT
================================================
The AI asks — Shall I create prompts?
Type YES.
The AI gives you several character ideas.
Type the number of the character you want.
The AI gives you:
- Character image prompt
- Scene prompts for every scene
================================================
STEP 04 — CHARACTER IMAGE
================================================
Copy the character image prompt.
Open Google Gemini.
Paste the prompt and generate the image.
Download the best result.
Check before moving forward:
- Head straight. Eyes looking directly into camera.
- Skin looks real. Every wrinkle visible.
- Pet looks natural. Not posed.
- Image is 9:16 vertical.
================================================
STEP 05 — VIDEO GENERATION
================================================
Open Google Flow.
For every scene follow these steps:
1. Upload the character image as the Start Frame.
2. Upload the same character image as the End Frame.
3. Copy the scene prompt from the AI and paste it in.
4. Click Generate.
5. Download the clip and save it with the scene number.
Example: scene_01.mp4
Repeat this for every scene.
TIP:
Using the same character image for both
Start Frame and End Frame keeps your character
looking consistent across all scenes.
================================================
STEP 06 — FINAL EDIT IN CAPCUP
================================================
Open CapCut.
Set the project to 9:16 vertical.
Do these things in order:
1. Add all scene videos in the correct order.
2. Add captions.
If you use auto-caption,
manually check and correct every single line.
Export the audio track only first.
Go to Export settings and select audio only.
Download as MP3 or WAV.
You will need this for the next step.
================================================
STEP 07 — VOICE CONSISTENCY
================================================
If your voice sounds inconsistent across scenes,
follow these steps to fix it.
STEP 07A — GET VOICE DESIGN PROMPT
Come back to this chat.
Tell Claude or ChatGPT:
"Give me an ElevenLabs voice design prompt
under 1000 characters for my character."
The AI will give you a voice prompt
that matches your character perfectly.
STEP 07B — DESIGN THE VOICE IN ELEVENLABS
Open ElevenLabs.
Go to Voice Design.
Paste the voice prompt.
Design and save the voice.
STEP 07C — USE ELEVENLABS VOICE CHANGER
Stay in ElevenLabs.
Go to Voice Changer.
Upload the audio file you exported from CapCut.
Select the voice you just designed.
ElevenLabs will convert the entire audio
into your new consistent voice.
Download the new audio file.
STEP 07D — REPLACE AUDIO IN CAPCUP
Go back to CapCut.
Remove the original audio track.
Add the new consistent audio file
downloaded from ElevenLabs.
Export the final video as MP4. 1080x1920. 30fps.
================================================
STEP 08 — POST ON FACEBOOK
================================================
Get your caption from the AI.
Open your Facebook page.
Upload the video.
Paste the caption.
Choose a thumbnail from Scene 01 showing
the character's face looking at camera.
Post it.
Reply to every comment within the first 60 minutes.
================================================
FULL WORKFLOW — QUICK VIEW
================================================
Master Prompt
|
Niche Select — Dogs or Cats
|
10 Topic Ideas — Pick 1
|
Script + Scene Breakdown
|
Character Ideas — Pick 1
|
Character Image Prompt + Scene Prompts
|
Google Gemini — Generate Character Image
|
Google Flow — Generate Scene Videos
Start Frame + End Frame = same character image
|
CapCut — Arrange Scenes + Captions
Export audio only
|
ElevenLabs Voice Design — Design matching voice
ElevenLabs Voice Changer — Upload audio + apply voice
Download consistent audio
|
CapCut — Replace audio + Final Export
|
Facebook — Post + Reply to comments
================================================
TIME PER VIDEO
================================================
Master prompt and script:        15 minutes
Character image:                 10 minutes
Scene videos:                    60 to 90 minutes
CapCut edit and captions:        20 minutes
ElevenLabs voice:                15 minutes
Final export and post:
